title: pycreus nervulosus
intro: Pycreus nervulosus, also known as the 'nervil grass', is a species of plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pycreus nervulosus include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Herbal preparations of Pycreus nervulosus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
